---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for PwrSnap
labels: [enhancement]
---

<!--
A picture or short recording makes a feature idea land far better than text alone
— a mockup, an annotated example, or a shot of how another tool does it.

PwrSnap is the easiest way to make one: snap it, annotate it, click the **Med**
copy button, and paste (⌘V) into the "Illustration" box below. For a flow,
record it and drop in a GIF.

Don't have PwrSnap yet? https://pwrsnap.com.
-->

## What do you want to be able to do?
<!-- Describe the capability, not the implementation. -->

## Why — what's the use case?
<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? What's painful today? -->

## Illustration
<!-- Paste a snap or GIF here (PwrSnap → **Med** copy → ⌘V). Mock it up,
     annotate a current screen, or show prior art. -->

## Alternatives you've considered
